title: Peppery Crispy Algerian Fish Tagine
description: A smoky, peppery tagine featuring panfried fish fillets, toasted coconut flakes, and a tangy pickle garnish-perfect for a romantic night in.

ingredients.name: coconut flakes
ingredients.notes: toast in a dry skillet until golden

instructions: Season cod fillets with salt, black pepper, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, lemon zest, and lemon juice, letting marinate for 5 minutes.
Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a cast‑iron skillet over medium‑high heat until shimmering.
Place fillets skin‑side up and sear for 4–5 minutes, then flip and sear the other side for another 4–5 minutes until golden and cooked through.
Remove fillets and set aside to rest for 2 minutes.
Add remaining 1 tbsp olive oil to the skillet and toss toasted coconut flakes until lightly toasted, about 1 minute.
Add chopped pickled turnips to the skillet and sauté for 2 minutes to warm through.
Return fish to the skillet, spoon some coconut and pickle mixture over each fillet, and cook for an additional minute to meld flavors.
Transfer to plates, sprinkle with fresh cilantro and mint, and serve immediately.
